working_on: Clear in-project GitHub Issues backlog: rewrite misleading allowlist doc (#6), build settings.json sync guard (#5), build concurrent-session boot guard (#3), close mid-session context-pressure as intractable with policy (#4), build setup_env.py + populate .env + validate Phase 5 (#7).

End state: backlog 7 -> 2 (the two upstream mempalace issues #1, #2 remain).
outcome_summary: Closed 5 GitHub Issues (#3 boot-time concurrent-session guard via check_session_conflict.py; #4 closed-as-intractable with CLAUDE.md posture bullet; #5 settings.json sync hard-fail via check_settings_sync.py + pre-commit; #6 routine-mode allowlist subsection rewritten to Auto-mode-supersedes; #7 setup_env.py one-time helper + boot pointer + live URL paste validated end-to-end against PostgreSQL 17.6, validate.py engages graph audit with 30 checks vs 23 prior). Backlog 7 -> 2 (upstream MemPalace #1, #2 remain). Validator clean: 23 checks, 0 hard-fails, 2 issue_collision soft-warns (only #1 and #2). pytest 562/562 (was 519; +43 new tests). 6 commits this session. ADR count unchanged at 51.

scope_delivery.explanation: All 5 in-project actionable issues from declared_scope landed: #6 doc rewrite, #5 settings.json sync guard + tests + pre-commit wire-in + ops-doc subsubsection, #3 concurrent-session guard + tests + hook + boot-procedure docs, #4 closure with policy bullet, #7 setup_env.py + tests + boot pointer + README/seed-chunked-authoring/STATE.md updates + live URL paste validated.
